bundles.drift_message: manual test — Flutter merged to staging, PHP merged to master; deploy SHA not verified
bundles.qa_intent:
Female free premium / free membership experiment — test ALL paths separately.

EXPERIMENT (50/50):
- Treatment: member_id % 2 == 0 (even) → show offer UI + eligible for ₹0 Basic 3-day grant
- Control: odd member_id → no popup/banner, no grant even if profile complete
- Rollout tweak in php #3749: experiment exposure 10% → 50%

ELIGIBILITY (all must be true for treatment popup):
- gender = female (member.gender = 2)
- self profile (on_behalf_id = 1)
- Payment_model::is_recurring($member_id) === true (recurring cohort, NOT active subscription)
- membership = 1 (free)
- not already rewarded
- variant = on / enabled in configurations.female_free_membership

EXCLUDED (no offer):
- male, on-behalf (daughter/sister), non-recurring, already premium, already rewarded, control cohort

FLUTTER SURFACES (do not collapse):
- Home pinned banner: FemaleFreeMembershipBanner on homepage_screen.dart (home tab only)
- Tap banner → FemaleFreeMembershipPopup.show → FemaleFreeMembershipFlowScreen (intro → steps → success)
- Step deep-links: photos → ProfileGallery(); selfie → SelfieInstructionPage(source: female_free_membership)
- Dashboard config: POST V1/dashboard_information → configurations.female_free_membership
- Progress API: POST V1/female_free_membership_progress
- Claim API: POST V1/female_free_membership_claim (explicit grant only — no passive auto-grant on dashboard poll)
- DashBaordProvider: effectiveFemaleFreeMembership, refreshFemaleFreeMembershipProgress

PRD CHECKLIST (backend source of truth — verify which steps ship in diff):
- photos: min 4 (pending counts toward 4 per PRD)
- bio: introduction or happy_story
- religious: namaz, quran, roza, zakat, hajj, hijab in life_style[0]
- lifestyle: diet, smoke, drink, personality_traits, marriage_values, marriage_timeline, interests
- family: familytype, familystatus, nativestate, fatheroccupation, motheroccupation, brother, sister (+ nativecity, married_bro/sis conditionals)
NOTE: Flutter model comments show keys photos|selfie and total_steps default 2 — if diff differs from PRD 5-step checklist, flag intent_diff_mismatch.

CLAIM ERRORS: not_eligible | incomplete_profile | already_rewarded | already_premium | reward_failed

BACKEND GRANT (on successful claim, idempotent):
- member.membership = 2
- payments_info = time() + 3*86400
- package_payment amount=0, payment_type = Female Profile Free Premium
- plans_recurring id 20 (Basic weekly)
- NO RM assignment for this promo
- Search_model::insert_update_search_temp membership=2
- Second claim must NOT extend expiry

ANALYTICS (MoEngage): ffm_popup_shown, ffm_popup_dismissed, ffm_checklist_completed, ffm_reward_granted, ffm_reward_failed

REGRESSION: V1.php dashboard_information_post shared surface — other popups/sheets still work
ENV: Flutter #633/#644 merged to staging; PHP #3710/#3749 merged to master
hints: flutter APIs: female_free_membership_progress, female_free_membership_claim; dashboard key configurations.female_free_membership
php #3710: free-female-experminent — V1.php dashboard_information, Common_model progress helpers, Payment_model grant
env mismatch: Flutter on staging, PHP on master
analytics: ffm_popup_shown, ffm_popup_dismissed, ffm_checklist_completed, ffm_reward_granted, ffm_reward_failed
